app/page.tsx::Home>main>p#children: This is a demo page for testing the inline CMS editing experience.
app/page.tsx::Home>main>section>p#childr: Edit any text directly on the page. Changes are saved to content.json.
app/page.tsx::Home>main>section[1]>p#chi: Add ?cms=edit to the URL to activate the editor overlay.
app/page.tsx::Home>main>section[1]>p[1]#: Or press Ctrl+Shift+E to toggle edit mode. Might be different on a Mac!
